description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a walled yard, featuring a spacious open courtyard and a rectangular swimming pool. The main building is flat-roofed with clean, geometric lines and large windows, giving it a contemporary appearance. The property includes landscaped areas with several trees and shrubs, as well as paved walkways and outdoor seating zones. The front entrance is defined by a wide gate and a pathway leading to the main door, while the backyard is dominated by the pool and a lounging area. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the overall layout emphasizes open space and outdoor living. The bungalow is set within a private, enclosed lot, providing both security and seclusion.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, enclosed yard, and a swimming pool, featuring large windows and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide gate, and a clear view of the pool and courtyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the landscaped yard, trees, and the flat roof structure with visible outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool area, backyard lounging space, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, rear wall, and additional landscaping with trees and shrubs.
